run_id.description: Unique identifier of the associated execution run

strategy.description: Experiment strategy (usually E, but included for correlation)

agent_role.description: Role of the agent invoking the retrieval (e.g., Planner, Coder, Reviewer)

query.description: The search query or parameters passed to the tool

returned_files.description: File paths touched or returned by this retrieval

returned_chunk_ids.description: List of chunk IDs returned from the document index

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the retrieved text/data to ensure immutability and provenance tracking

excerpt.description: A textual excerpt of the top retrieved content for analysis

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the retrieval took place

token_count.description: Number of tokens in the retrieved content
